raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint concerns fraudulent charges on my credit card account ending in XXXX. In XX/XX/year>, a total of 52 unauthorized transactions were posted to my account, totaling {$370.00}. These transactions were not made by me or by any authorized user on the account.

I promptly contacted Citibank to report the fraud and dispute the charges ; however, my request for a refund was denied. Under the terms of the cardmember agreement, cardholders have zero liability for unauthorized transactions.

Accordingly, I am submitting this complaint to request a full refund of the disputed amount.
